title: He Promised No More Wars. Then 7 B-2s Flew.
title_alt: Seven B-2s. Three Sites. One Vanished Promise.
The Live Campaign Page Is Gone. The Receipt Is Not.
What Happened To Trump's No More Wars Promise?
description:
In 2024, the campaign page promised to keep America out of unnecessary foreign wars. The archived page still exists. The live campaign pages now return 404. Then, five months after inauguration, seven B-2s flew to Iran.

This is not a rage piece. It is a receipt: the archived campaign page, the live 404, the strike, and the SEALED 2016 grades that already showed the contradiction.

Full receipt hub: https://campaignreceipts.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=longform&utm_campaign=cr-what-happened-to-trump
SEALED 2016 scorecard: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=longform&utm_campaign=cr-what-happened-to-trump
Join the free newsletter: https://campaignreceipts.com/weekly?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=longform&utm_campaign=cr-what-happened-to-trump

Chapters
0:00 Seven planes, one page, one vanished promise
0:33 The 2024 campaign page promise
1:26 The live pages now return 404
2:17 Operation Midnight Hammer
3:41 SEALED 2016: the Iran-deal promise and the war promise
5:21 The weaponization promise and the First Amendment cases
7:46 The receipt, not a command to flip your vote
8:58 CampaignReceipts.com, Sealed2016.com, and the free newsletter

Campaign Receipts is a nonpartisan receipt channel. Same standard whichever side the money or promise comes from.
